fields.name: zone_id
fields.description: Logical zone identifier such as compute, cooling, or power

fields.name: inlet_temp_c
fields.description: Rack inlet temperature in degree Celsius

fields.name: cooling_health
fields.description: Cooling state: nominal, degraded, or failed

fields.name: hotspot_risk
fields.description: Hotspot risk level: low, medium, or high

fields.name: status
fields.description: Overall rack state: normal, warning, or critical
